title: The Bankers Books Evidence Act, 1891
full_text: The Bankers Books Evidence Act, 1891 बैंककार बही साक्ष्‍य अधिनियम, 1891 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 189118 Act Number: 18 Enactment Date: 1891-10-01 Act Year: 1891 Short Title: The Bankers Books Evidence Act, 1891 Hindi Title: बैंककार बही साक्ष्‍य अधिनियम, 1891बैंककार बही साक्ष्‍य अधिनियम, 1891 Long Title: An Act to amend the Law of Evidence with respect to Bankers' Books. Ministry: Ministry of Finance Department: Department of Financial Services Enforcement Date: 01-10-1891 Last Updated: 04-02-2019 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Bankers Books Evidence Act, 1891 Show all section Section 1. Title and extent. Section 2. Definitions. Section 2A. Conditions in the printout. Section 3. Power to extend provisions of Act. Section 4. Mode of proof of entries in bankers’ books. Section 5. Case in which officer of bank not compellable to produce books. Section 6. Inspection of books by order of Court or Judge. Section 7. Costs. Section 8. Order of court to be construed to be order made by specified officer.
